articles.title: China records most new unicorn start-ups in 5 years as AI and robotics boom
articles.summary: China has experienced a remarkable surge in innovation, producing 67 new unicorn start-ups in just six months, fueled by a booming AI and robotics sector, marking the highest growth in nearly five years. This unprecedented rate of new billion-dollar companies underscores the country's pivotal role in shaping the future of technology and investment.

articles.title: How Open Models Are Driving AI Research
articles.summary: NVIDIA's significant presence at ICML 2026, with 74 accepted papers, underscores a pivotal shift in AI research towards open frontier models and infrastructure, which are now essential for advancing modern AI science. This breakthrough not only democratizes access to cutting-edge technology but also accelerates innovation across the global research community.

articles.title: Alibaba wins reprieve on US lobbying after Pentagon blacklisted companies
articles.summary: Alibaba has gained a crucial temporary legal reprieve allowing it to continue lobbying in the U.S. despite being blacklisted by the Pentagon for alleged ties to China's military, a development that could significantly impact its operations and influence in the American market. This ruling underscores the ongoing tensions between U.S. national security concerns and the interests of major tech companies in navigating regulatory landscapes.

articles.title: How Nations Are Deploying AI for Strategic Priorities
articles.summary: Nations are strategically harnessing AI to revolutionize their economies and enhance national security, positioning this transformative technology as a critical driver of innovation across diverse sectors such as healthcare, transportation, and communications. This unprecedented investment in AI capabilities underscores its significance as the defining technology of our era, reshaping global competitiveness and societal advancement.

articles.title: The latest in our company transformation
articles.summary: Microsoft is undergoing a significant transformation by eliminating approximately 4,800 roles, or 2.1% of its global workforce, to streamline operations and concentrate investments, highlighting a strategic shift in response to evolving market demands. This move underscores the company's commitment to transparency and adaptability in a competitive landscape.

articles.title: Huawei’s next smartphone chip taps new scaling law for performance boost: paper
articles.summary: Huawei's upcoming Kirin 2026 smartphone chip leverages its innovative LogicFolding architecture to achieve a remarkable 55 percent increase in transistor density, promising significant performance enhancements without relying on advanced manufacturing processes. This breakthrough positions Huawei to compete more effectively in the high-end smartphone market, potentially reshaping industry standards for mobile processing power.

articles.title: Global robotaxi market set to hit US$1t by 2040 as China tech costs plummet: Morgan Stanley
articles.summary: The global robotaxi market is projected to reach an astonishing US$1 trillion by 2040, fueled by plummeting manufacturing costs in China, positioning local innovators like Baidu and Xpeng as key players alongside established giants Tesla and Waymo. This shift not only underscores the transformative potential of autonomous transportation but also highlights the critical role of cost efficiency in driving widespread adoption.

articles.title: Begone dull care
articles.summary:
• The fusion of jazz and animation in 1949 creates a sensory experience that transcends traditional forms of art.  
• Abstract visuals serve as a dynamic interpretation of music, inviting viewers to explore the boundaries of perception.  
• This artistic collaboration challenges the notion of reality, blurring the lines between sound and sight.  
• The work exemplifies how creativity can liberate the mind, encouraging a deeper engagement with both art and emotion.  
• Ultimately, it reflects the transformative power of art to evoke joy and transcend the mundane.

articles.title: Skill nostalgia
articles.summary:
• The resurgence of traditional skills like beekeeping and baking reflects a deep yearning for authenticity in an increasingly digital world.  
• Engaging in hands-on crafts may serve as a rebellion against the alienation of modern labor, fostering a sense of community and connection.  
• This trend suggests that nostalgia for manual skills could lead to a more meaningful and fulfilling approach to work and life.  
• The act of creating with one's hands can be a profound expression of identity and purpose, transcending mere hobbyism.  
• Ultimately, the revival of these skills invites a philosophical inquiry into the nature of work and its role in human flourishing.

articles.title: China’s Biren seeks US$900m to fund GPU push and challenge Nvidia amid AI boom
articles.summary: Shanghai Biren Technology is raising nearly $900 million to ramp up GPU production, positioning itself as a formidable competitor to Nvidia in the rapidly expanding AI market, which could significantly reshape the landscape of AI chip manufacturing in China. This move underscores the intensifying race among tech companies to capitalize on the surging demand for AI capabilities.
